buyer_review.buyer: To help other buyers understand the shady transactions that are conducted by this business.
buyer_review.seller: Ther removal of the bad review damages the credibility of the store and it portrays the store in a negative light whereas the problem could have easily been avaoided had the customer read the policy

receive_apology.buyer: This might be important to me as it will show the public that the business was in the wrong and not me.
receive_apology.seller: It will ensure the dignity and credibility is restored in the store and it will allow the customers to take note of the issue so that they can either buy the jersey or not

refund.buyer: This might help in purchasing a completely new jersey, thus the business dont get your money and you receive a new jersey.
refund.seller: The company policy states that the jersey is standard and it does not have the names of famous players

seller_review.buyer: This will clear my name, and will not harm reputation and deter future sales from occuring.
seller_review.seller: The review will aid the customer to remain alert of the experience and take note of looking at other stores for their desired item

speaker: Buyer
text: Hello, may we discuss the issue of receiving a refund?

speaker: Seller
text: Hello, unfortunately, the company policy does not allow refunds.

speaker: Buyer
text: Is there no way to negotiate a partial refund either?

speaker: Seller
text: We can work on replacing your item once you have stated its condition

speaker: Buyer
text: The item is not what was advertised on the website

speaker: Seller
text: If you checked the website, you would have seen the images of the item. You can choose anything else from the store to replace that item

speaker: Buyer
text: The jersey i ordered is not what had arrived at my door, however if it is not possible to get a refund, may i get an apology from the company?

speaker: Seller
text: That is fair and subsequent to that, the company would appreciate it if you either apologise for the misunderstanding

speaker: Buyer
text: I understand, is it possible then since we have cleared the air , that the company retract their bad review of me?

speaker: Seller
text: Thank you for understanding, and the company will do so

speaker: Buyer
text: Submitted agreement: Buyer gets no refund, buyer retracted their review, seller retracted their review, buyer did apologize, and seller did apologize.
